ksa_text: Skill in implementing AI system transparency and explainability mechanisms, including model interpretability techniques, output explanation methods, and confidence communication appropriate to different user contexts and regulatory requirements.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-019 (AI, Skill) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4430 is insufficient to establish relevance to geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.443, eu_ai_act=0.442, onet=0.405) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4430 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-S-019 (composite 0.4430) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4430 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Geospatial Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4430 is not a standard requirement for Geospatial Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4430, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
